title: Extra Merchant Markers
description: A resource pack to add custom icons for the Merchant Markers mod to support various mods that add professions.
body:
This resource pack adds extra icons to the Merchant Markers mod so modded villager professions can have their own custom icons.

This requires at minimum the Merchant Markers mod: (https://modrinth.com/mod/merchant-markers)

Currently, this pack adds icons for the following mods:

- Chef's Delight (https://modrinth.com/mod/chefs-delight)
- Cobblemon Paleontology (https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-paleontology)
- TMCraft (https://modrinth.com/mod/tmcraft)
